name: a vision that names no known technology activates no family and stays back-compatible
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'exit(JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["family_activated"]==[] ? 0:1)' && echo no-tech-no-family 1>&2
